review.notes: Site owner confirmed the 16 approved sources, four core query groups, bounded budget, and attribution boundary on 2026-07-19.

sources.name: Anthropic News
sources.rationale: First-party model, product, safety, and research announcements.

review.notes: Stable dated article list and high AI signal; use HTML incremental collection and metadata plus short excerpts only.

sources.name: Google AI Blog
sources.rationale: First-party Google AI product and company announcements.

review.notes: RSS is available but mixes Search, Workspace, Education, and other non-AI items; require secondary AI filtering.

sources.name: Google DeepMind Blog
sources.rationale: First-party frontier model, science, research, and safety updates.

review.notes: Dedicated AI blog with stable RSS, dates, and high research/model signal; use RSS discovery and article-page summaries.

sources.name: Microsoft AI Blog
sources.rationale: First-party enterprise AI, product, partnership, and adoption announcements.

review.notes: Topic page spans several Microsoft channels and the available feed is full-site noisy; require strict AI filtering.

sources.name: AWS Machine Learning Blog
sources.rationale: First-party cloud AI service releases and production engineering guidance.

review.notes: Stable dated list and RSS with strong AI signal; separate technical releases from tutorials, customer cases, and promotion.

sources.name: Google Cloud AI and ML Blog
sources.rationale: First-party Vertex AI, cloud model, agent, and enterprise AI updates.

review.notes: AI list is usable but lacks a confirmed feed and has substantial product, ranking, and customer-marketing noise.

sources.name: Microsoft Research Blog
sources.rationale: First-party research results with stronger explanatory context than release notes.

review.notes: Stable recent-post list and RSS; high research quality, with explicit AI topic filtering for broader research posts.

sources.name: Hugging Face Blog
sources.rationale: Core first-party source for open models, datasets, libraries, and community tooling.

review.notes: Stable RSS but mixes official, partner, and community authors; require author or organization allowlists and attribution labels.

sources.name: NVIDIA Developer Blog
sources.rationale: First-party GPU, inference, training, and AI infrastructure engineering updates.

review.notes: Stable dated feed with strong inference and infrastructure signal; filter non-AI CUDA/graphics posts and label vendor claims.

sources.name: Apple Newsroom
sources.rationale: First-party Apple Intelligence, device, and operating-system announcements.

review.notes: General Apple newsroom has low AI density; keep only as a future targeted Apple Intelligence supplement, not a daily source.

sources.name: Qualcomm OnQ
sources.rationale: First-party edge AI, chip, mobile, and device ecosystem updates.

review.notes: Stable tagged list and AI-filtered entry; use the AI tag and filter mobile, 5G, and pure product promotion noise.

sources.name: Adobe Artificial Intelligence Blog
sources.rationale: First-party generative media, Firefly, and creative workflow announcements.

review.notes: AI topic page is accessible but its complete list is dynamic and the guessed feed is unavailable; wait for stable CMS or sitemap evidence.

sources.name: GitHub Changelog
sources.rationale: First-party Copilot, platform, and developer-tool changes with strong timeliness.

review.notes: Stable dated list and RSS; restrict to Copilot/AI/model tags and preserve deprecation notices.

sources.name: Meta Engineering
sources.rationale: First-party large-scale AI systems, infrastructure, and engineering articles.

review.notes: Stable engineering feed and AI Research category; filter non-AI infrastructure and preserve author/category attribution.

sources.name: ByteDance Newsroom
sources.rationale: First-party company and product announcements relevant to the China AI ecosystem.

review.notes: English newsroom is stale and lacks a current stable AI stream; rediscover a maintained official technical source first.

sources.name: Alibaba Group News
sources.rationale: First-party company, model, cloud, and business AI announcements.

review.notes: Current AI announcements are discoverable, with canonical links moving to alizila.com; deduplicate and filter corporate PR.

sources.name: Zhipu AI News
sources.rationale: First-party Chinese source for GLM model and product announcements.

review.notes: The path resolves to a product page without stable article links or dates; require a public news archive or API before reconsidering.

sources.name: Mistral AI News
sources.rationale: First-party model, API, partnership, and open-weight release announcements.

review.notes: Dedicated list exposes dated Product, Research, and Engineering articles; use HTML incremental collection because guessed RSS is unavailable.

sources.name: Cohere Blog
sources.rationale: First-party enterprise models, retrieval, deployment, and research updates.

review.notes: Stable dated AI blog list; use HTML collection, prioritize research/product/engineering, and filter partner or SEO content.

sources.name: Databricks Engineering Blog
sources.rationale: First-party data and AI platform engineering, training, and production systems.

review.notes: Engineering page is stable but mixed and often lacks dates; require AI-specific filtering and verified feed/category extraction.

sources.name: Snowflake Engineering Blog
sources.rationale: First-party data cloud, ML platform, and AI infrastructure engineering updates.

review.notes: Page is reachable with AI signal but dates and feed support are weak; keep as supplementary until per-article date extraction is proven.

sources.name: Red Hat AI Blog Channel
sources.rationale: First-party open-source, hybrid cloud, and enterprise AI engineering content.

review.notes: Dedicated AI channel and RSS are available; filter edge topics and label product/ROI claims as vendor statements.

sources.name: Alibaba Cloud AI and Machine Learning Blog
sources.rationale: First-party cloud AI services and engineering practices from Alibaba Cloud.

review.notes: URL redirects to a not-found page despite a 200 response; rediscover a current official AI category before use.

sources.name: Moonshot AI Platform Docs
sources.rationale: First-party Chinese API documentation suitable for tracking capability changes.

review.notes: Docs and llms.txt are stable but this is a capability reference, not a dated news stream; use only for explicit change detection.

sources.name: MiniMax News
sources.rationale: First-party Chinese model, product, and company announcements.

review.notes: Official AI news exists but the index is client-rendered without a stable dated list; prove structured-data extraction before enabling.

sources.name: ModelScope Headlines
sources.rationale: First-party Chinese open-model, dataset, tool, and community ecosystem updates.

review.notes: Page shell exposes no repeatable titles, links, or dates; require a public API, SSR payload, or feed before reconsidering.

sources.name: CNCF Blog
sources.rationale: First-party cloud-native ecosystem source for AI infrastructure projects and releases.

review.notes: Stable dated RSS and article metadata; filter AI/ML/agent/GPU topics and distinguish staff, project, member, and vendor posts.

sources.name: Kubernetes Blog
sources.rationale: First-party orchestration source for AI workload, scheduling, and platform changes.

review.notes: Stable list and feed with dates and attribution; filter AI workload topics and preserve the CC BY attribution boundary.

sources.name: CMU Machine Learning Blog
sources.rationale: Research explanations from an academic machine learning community.

review.notes: Stable dated research feed with high AI signal and low marketing noise; link papers/code and avoid expanding author claims.

sources.name: MIT Technology Review AI
sources.rationale: Independent analysis of AI technology, industry, policy, and social impact.

review.notes: Dedicated AI RSS has dates and strong analysis signal; exclude or label sponsored content and treat as analysis, not first-party release evidence.

queryGroups.label: Frontier model releases
queryGroups.rationale: Find first-party launches, capability updates, and model deprecations across major labs.
queries: AI model launch release notes API official
foundation model capability pricing context window update
AI model deprecation retirement API official

review.notes: Core high-timeliness group; reduced threshold and noise exclusions; keep signal for release/deprecation gaps.

queryGroups.label: Agent platforms and protocols
queryGroups.rationale: Track agent runtimes, tool protocols, orchestration frameworks, and production agent features.
queries: agent runtime SDK release notes official
Model Context Protocol specification update official
agent orchestration framework release GitHub

review.notes: Useful after separating runtime/protocol from developer-tool overlap; keep disabled until boundary is confirmed.

queryGroups.label: Open-source AI ecosystem
queryGroups.rationale: Find open-weight models, datasets, inference stacks, and important repository releases.
queries: open weight model release model card
open source inference runtime release notes
AI dataset release dataset card benchmark

review.notes: Core open ecosystem group; removed hard domain restriction so project-owned release pages are not hidden.

queryGroups.label: AI infrastructure and inference
queryGroups.rationale: Track chips, inference runtimes, serving systems, training infrastructure, and cloud-native changes.
queries: LLM inference runtime release notes
GPU AI inference software SDK release official
LLM serving framework release benchmark

review.notes: Core infrastructure group; narrowed queries and disabled signal to reduce hardware and vendor noise.

queryGroups.label: Enterprise AI platforms
queryGroups.rationale: Find meaningful enterprise platform, retrieval, security, and deployment changes.
queries: enterprise AI platform generally available release notes
RAG retrieval platform security deployment release notes
enterprise AI audit governance feature GA official

review.notes: Rebuilt toward GA/security/release evidence but remains disabled until a separate enterprise scope and noise review.

queryGroups.label: AI research breakthroughs
queryGroups.rationale: Surface consequential research results while avoiding daily-paper volume overload.
queries: site:arxiv.org AI benchmark state of the art code
machine learning paper official project page dataset code
AI evaluation research technical report official

review.notes: Removed the subjective breakthrough threshold from the active set; needs a defined significance gate and likely split scope.

queryGroups.label: AI developer tools
queryGroups.rationale: Track coding assistants, SDKs, evaluation tools, and developer workflow changes.
queries: AI coding assistant release notes official
AI SDK API changelog official
LLM evaluation framework release notes GitHub

review.notes: Removed GitHub-only restriction and signal; keep disabled until SDK/tool overlap with agent-platforms is resolved.

queryGroups.label: China AI releases
queryGroups.rationale: Improve timeliness and coverage for Chinese model, platform, agent, and open-source releases.
queries: 大模型 新版本 官方 发布 API
智能体 平台 更新 发布 官方
开源 大模型 发布 模型卡 GitHub Hugging Face

review.notes: Core Chinese coverage group; tightened vocabulary and retained signal for fragmented first-party discovery.

queryGroups.label: AI policy and safety
queryGroups.rationale: Track material safety research, regulatory changes, evaluations, and deployment governance.
queries: AI regulation law guidance official government
AI safety evaluation technical report official
AI model risk standard official regulator

review.notes: Jurisdiction and source policy remain undefined; do not enable until the group is split or scoped.

queryGroups.label: Multimodal and edge AI
queryGroups.rationale: Track image, audio, video, robotics, device, and on-device model advances.
queries: multimodal foundation model release official image audio video
on-device edge AI model SDK release official
robotics vision language action model release official

review.notes: Queries now cover edge and robotics explicitly; keep disabled until overlap with frontier and product-news sources is measured.
